# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source is institute-worthy because it contains a concrete experimental writeup with reported operational results.

## Why

This is not generic commentary alone; it reports a specific long-horizon coding-agent experiment with explicit figures for runtime, spend, token volume, session structure, files changed, tests, and task outcome. That gives it real empirical substance as an informal blog post with data.

## Limits
